order() - Method in class io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.ds.Set.NonEmpty
 
order() - Method in interface io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.ds.Set
Returns the ordering strategy used by this set.
orElse(B) - Method in interface io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.ds.Either
Returns the Right value if present, otherwise returns the provided default.
orElse(T) - Method in interface io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.ds.Maybe
Returns the contained value if present, otherwise returns the provided default.
orElseGet(Supplier<? extends B>) - Method in interface io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.ds.Either
Returns the Right value if present, otherwise returns the result of the supplier.
orElseGet(Supplier<? extends T>) - Method in interface io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.ds.Maybe
Returns the contained value if present, otherwise returns the result of the supplier.
orElseThrow(Supplier<? extends X>) - Method in interface io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.ds.Either
Returns the Right value if present, otherwise throws the exception from the supplier.
orElseThrow(Supplier<? extends X>) - Method in interface io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.ds.Maybe
Returns the contained value if present, otherwise throws the exception from the supplier.
